messages.author: CJ Wolff
messages.text: I'm trying to cover New Orleans, Metairie, and Kenner. Then we take the Northshore.
messages.content_html: I'm trying to cover New Orleans, Metairie, and Kenner. Then we take the Northshore.

messages.author: CJ Wolff
messages.text: Cool. i'm building garden lights with nrf chips in them. Looking to get a few more folks involved so I can manufacture more. I'm thinking about 100 units would cover New orleans, kenner, metairie

messages.author: freebeer
messages.text: With this and Meshtastic height + LoS is better over all. With the right height you can pretty much cover most of the city with a single node (edited)

messages.author: Robbie
messages.text: Our stuff is slowly arriving, so hopefully in the next 2 or 3 weeks we will have 3 repeaters up on the northshore. They will all be 9dbi antennas with V4s, all around 20ish ft high. 1 will be under 1/2 mile from the lake (edited)
messages.content_html: Our stuff is slowly arriving, so hopefully in the next 2 or 3 weeks we will have 3 repeaters up on the northshore. They will all be 9dbi antennas with V4s, all around 20ish ft high. 1 will be under 1/2 mile from the lake (edited)
messages.reply_html:
CJ Wolff
I'm trying to cover New Orleans, Metairie, and Kenner. Then we take the Northshore.

messages.author: Robbie
messages.text: 1 repeater is up, the 2nd is waiting on the antenna, and the 3rd is waiting on a mast. Then there will be 3.
messages.content_html: 1 repeater is up, the 2nd is waiting on the antenna, and the 3rd is waiting on a mast. Then there will be 3.

messages.author: Robbie
messages.forwarded_html:
Forwarded
https://www.votervoice.net/ESA/Campaigns/134777/Respond I dont know if these things actually help, but its a petition to our representatives to stop them from selling off parts of the 900mhz band. We keep getting these emails at work, so I finally filled it out today.
Originally sent: 2026-03-03 4:29 p.m.
